stemHtml: Which of the following options is one of the difference between cones and rods in the eye?

options.a: Most of the rods are in the fovea and most  cones are in the outside area.
options.b: Rods have high visual acuity while cones observe colours.
options.c: Cones are more sensitive to colours than rods.
options.d: Cones are more sensitive to light than rods.
